untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a configurable minimum_gap_filter threshold parameter that is not specified (marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). The exact gap percentage or absolute price threshold needed to trigger trades cannot be determined from the source material. Additionally, the signal specifies trading based on 'first 30-minute bar direction' which requires intraday bar-level analysis; this JSON schema operates on daily bars and cannot distinguish intraday 30-minute bar direction. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT provide no explicit exit rule.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture gap logic using open vs prev_close comparison, and direction-dependent entry/exit based on first bar behavior, but core threshold parameter and intraday observation period are not translatable to this daily-bar backtest engine.
